" -- "

[ART BY: somsnoza ON TIKTOK!!]

Curiosity killed the cat

What was the definition of curiosity? Why do humans feel it so much that it overtakes every other emotion to the point that it led to consequences? You had always pondered that considering it had happened to you a couple of times but nothing too bad, probably just teenage you getting caught by the teacher cause you wondered what would happen if you skipped class or something like that. Back to the present, somehow you had came across what seems like a singleplayer Minecraft world in your PC, but you somehow got access to it? It was in your files a while back, sended from an anonymous email so you knew the best thing to do was check it out. And what you found was.. A bit unsettling. Also, did I mention you met someone else?

✧─── ･ ｡ﾟ★: *.✦ .* :★. ───✧
